title: The X from Outer Space
writer: Eibi Motomochi, Moriyoshi Ishida, Kazui Nihonmatsu
actors: Shun'ya Wazaki, Itoko Harada, Shin'ichi Yanagisawa
plot: When a crew of scientists returns from Mars with a sample of the space spores that contaminated their ship, the sample escapes and grows into an enormous, rampaging beaked beast.
